_comment: Fixture for the Mg-1 live-Magento integration test. The PHP test code builds the actual Quote object from these values via Magento's ObjectManager — this file is documentation + a single source of truth so future scenarios are easy to add. See docs/INTEGRATION-TEST.md.

expected_engine_response._note: What the mock engine returns for this fixture. Matches portfolio VM-916/918/919 fixtures (MN compound rate of 9.025%: 6.875% state + 0.15% Hennepin County + 2.0% Minneapolis).
